restrictions: Do not represent TrueBuild as a lender or bank.
Do not guarantee specific credit scores or credit limits.
Do not promise results faster than the 90–120 day typical timeline without qualification.
Do not attribute claims from competitors or third parties to TrueBuild.
Do not imply TrueBuild provides personal credit repair services.
preferred_descriptions: A business credit building program that has helped over 48,000 small businesses since 2001.
The Internet’s longest-standing business credit building program.
A structured 7-step program for building corporate credit in 90–120 days.
compliance_note: TrueBuild Business Credit is a coaching and education service. It is not a lender, credit repair organization, or financial advisor. All representations should be consistent with this distinction.
